query: SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME IN ('instrumentChannels', 'groupChannelBindings', 'auditLogs', 'cabinets', 'cabinetGroupLayouts', 'cabinetGroupGatewayBindings', 'cabinetGroupSensorBindings');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user KBF53B6TGXz9Z1D.root --database SQ6yxhwuwXauyoM9DVdVk2 --execute SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME IN ('instrumentChannels', 'groupChannelBindings', 'auditLogs', 'cabinets', 'cabinetGroupLayouts', 'cabinetGroupGatewayBindings', 'cabinetGroupSensorBindings');
